name: Horn and Hardart's Baked Macaroni and Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni according to package directions.
2. Preheat oven to 400°F (204°C).
3. Melt butter in the top of a double boiler.
4. Gradually blend flour, salt, white pepper, and red pepper into the melted butter until smooth.
5. Add milk and light cream, stirring constantly.
6. Cook for a few minutes until the mixture thickens.
7. Stir in cheddar cheese until melted and sauce is smooth.
8. Remove from heat and stir in cooked macaroni.
9. Add sugar to canned tomatoes and combine with the macaroni.
10. Pour the mixture into a buttered baking dish.
11. Bake until the surface browns.
